certificate.description: The certificate in PEM format. The certificate chain must be no greater than 5 certs long. The chain must include at least one intermediate cert. **Note**: This property is sensitive and will not be displayed in the plan.

private_key.description: The write-only private key in PEM format. **Note**: This property is sensitive and will not be displayed in the plan.

description.description: An optional description of this resource.

name.description: Name of the resource. Provided by the client when the resource is created. The name must be 1-63 characters long, and comply with RFC1035. Specifically, the name must be 1-63 characters long and match the regular expression `[a-z]([-a-z0-9]*[a-z0-9])?` which means the first character must be a lowercase letter, and all following characters must be a dash, lowercase letter, or digit, except the last character, which cannot be a dash. These are in the same namespace as the managed SSL certificates.

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.

name_prefix.description: specified prefix. Conflicts with `name`. Max length is 54 characters. Prefixes with lengths longer than 37 characters will use a shortened UUID that will be more prone to collisions. Resulting name for a `name_prefix` <= 37 characters: `name_prefix` + YYYYmmddHHSSssss + 8 digit incremental counter Resulting name for a `name_prefix` 38 - 54 characters: `name_prefix` + YYmmdd + 3 digit incremental counter
